'''bangudhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:readjournment|readjournment]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-ng-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:readjournment|readjournment]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| bangudhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bængidhith|bængidhith]] || [[word:bængidhij|bængidhij]] || [[word:bængidhish|bængidhish]] || [[word:bængidhi|bængidhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bangungudhuth|bangungudhuth]] || [[word:bangungudhuj|bangungudhuj]] || [[word:bangungudhush|bangungudhush]] || [[word:bangungudhu|bangungudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bangudhuth|bangudhuth]] || [[word:bangudhuj|bangudhuj]] || [[word:bangudhush|bangudhush]] || [[word:bangudhu|bangudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bangufdhuth|bangufdhuth]] || [[word:bangufdhuj|bangufdhuj]] || [[word:bangufdhush|bangufdhush]] || [[word:bangufdhuf|bangufdhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bangudhuthu|bangudhuthu]] || [[word:bangudhuju|bangudhuju]] || [[word:bangudhushu|bangudhushu]] || [[word:bangudhuku|bangudhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bangudhuth|bangudhuth]] || [[word:bangudhuj|bangudhuj]] || [[word:bangudhush|bangudhush]] || [[word:bangudhu|bangudhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bangudhuthul|bangudhuthul]] || [[word:bangudhujul|bangudhujul]] || [[word:bangudhushul|bangudhushul]] || [[word:bangudhukul|bangudhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bangudhuthuthu|bangudhuthuthu]] || [[word:bangudhujuju|bangudhujuju]] || [[word:bangudhushushu|bangudhushushu]] || [[word:bangudhuku|bangudhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bangudhuthun|bangudhuthun]] || [[word:bangudhujun|bangudhujun]] || [[word:bangudhushun|bangudhushun]] || [[word:bangudhukun|bangudhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bangudhuthuoro|bangudhuthuoro]] || [[word:bangudhujuoro|bangudhujuoro]] || [[word:bangudhushuoro|bangudhushuoro]] || [[word:bangudhukuoro|bangudhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
